choices.text: anchor build + spin up solana-test-validator + deploy + run Mocha tests + cleanup. Local validator instant; no devnet airdrops needed. TS tests via anchor.workspace.Program.

questions.explanation: Build → validator → deploy → tests in one command.

choices.text: try/catch around tx; expect(err.error.errorCode.code).to.equal("Unauthorized"). Test both success + failure for each instruction; catches missing constraints and helps prevent auth bypass.

questions.explanation: Negative tests catch auth bypass + missing constraints.
